feedback_text: Ever since the last update I get logged out within like two minutes of signing in with SSO. Have to re-auth constantly, it's driving my whole team crazy.
session keeps dying right after i log in with okta sso. cant get any work done today

SSO login is broken since v2.4.0. Session drops after roughly 90 seconds every single time. This is blocking our entire engineering team from using FlowHub during a sprint deadline this week. Please escalate - we are considering downgrading our plan if this isn't fixed soon.
logged out again??
I really don't understand why I have to log in five times a day now. It wasn't like this before the update. Please fix it soon, it's testing my patience with the product.
Is anyone else having trouble staying logged in after the recent update? Just want to know if it's a known issue or something on my end before I open a ticket.
Password reset link never arrived in my inbox, checked spam too. Tried three times over two days before giving up and emailing support directly.
Reset password email took almost an hour to show up, by then the link had expired. A bit annoying but I got in eventually.

Absolutely furious. I was locked out of my account for TWO DAYS because your password reset emails never came through. I run my whole team's sprint planning through this tool and had zero access. This better not happen again.
quick note - login page redesign looks a lot cleaner after the update, nice work. still logs me out kinda fast tho lol
Task assignment notifications are showing up over an hour late. By the time I see them the deadline has practically passed.
Push notifications on my phone are so delayed they're basically useless at this point, sometimes 2 hours behind.
getting notifs like 45 min after someone mentions me, kinda defeats the purpose
Notification delivery has gotten noticeably slower since the pipeline update. Not completely broken, just sluggish and inconsistent - sometimes instant, sometimes an hour later.
It's not clear from the settings page whether 'instant' notifications actually mean instant anymore. Might be worth updating the label since there's clearly a delay built in now.
Mobile push notifications straight up don't arrive for me anymore, not even delayed. In-app ones still work fine though.
My notification preferences keep resetting to default every time I log out. Have to redo my digest settings constantly, and in the meantime I get instant pings I specifically turned off.
Noticed notifications lag more during business hours, presumably a load issue on your end. Seems fine late at night.
Das ist jetzt das dritte Mal, dass ich verzoegerte Benachrichtigungen melde, und der Support sagt nur, ich solle den Cache leeren.
The dashboard takes forever to load now, easily 10-15 seconds every morning when I first open it.
Dashboard loading has gotten really slow since the widget redesign. We have a big workspace (600+ tasks) so maybe that's related.
anyone else's dashboard just... hanging on load? spinning wheel for like 15 secs before anything shows up
Dashboard performance has degraded noticeably over the past month. Loading the widgets view now takes 8-12 seconds consistently on our Enterprise workspace, compared to under 2 seconds before v2.2.0.
Search within the dashboard is slow too, not just the initial load. Typing a query and waiting 3-4 seconds for results feels dated.
dashboard so slow today, is something down?
Dashboard widgets sometimes don't load at all and just show a blank grey box until I refresh the page.
The activity feed widget on my dashboard hasn't updated in three days even though my team has been actively working.
We pay for the Enterprise plan specifically for reliability and the dashboard has been embarrassingly slow for weeks now. I've mentioned this in two previous tickets with no resolution.
I was charged twice for my annual renewal this month. Please refund the duplicate charge immediately, this is unacceptable for a billing system.
Got double-billed on renewal. Support said it's a 'known issue' - if it's known, why wasn't it fixed before charging customers again?
My latest invoice has a tax line that doesn't match my region's actual tax rate. Either fix the invoice or explain the discrepancy.
Upgraded to Pro mid-month and got charged the FULL price with no proration. Feels like a bait and switch.
The pricing page says one thing and my actual invoice says another. Very confusing and honestly feels a bit shady.
Why is there a tax charge on my invoice this month that wasn't there last month? Did something change with your billing setup?
Can someone explain what the 'workspace add-on fee' on my bill actually covers? Not seeing this documented anywhere.
Billing dashboard shows I was charged twice in May but only one transaction shows up in my bank statement - the numbers don't add up on your end.
Downgraded from Enterprise to Pro last week and I'm still being billed at the Enterprise rate.
App crashes every single time I try to open a task that has a file attached. Happens on both my phone and tablet.
Mobile app force closes when opening tasks with attachments larger than a few MB. Started right after the latest app update.
Getting randomly logged out of the mobile app like 4-5 times a day. Really disruptive when I'm trying to check something quickly between meetings.
iOS app signs me out constantly, way more than the web version. Wasn't like this a couple months ago.
New crash I haven't seen reported: app closes immediately when I try to switch workspaces from the mobile menu.
android app froze completely trying to upload a photo attachment to a task, had to force close
crashes on opening any task w attachments, android, super annoying
The mobile app navigation is confusing after the redesign - took me a while to even find where task attachments show up now.
The mobile app has been unreliable since the rewrite. Constant logouts, occasional crashes. For a paid Pro plan I expect better stability than this.
Please, please add a dark mode option for the dashboard. I work late a lot and the bright white screen is rough on the eyes.
Dark mode when? This has been requested for ages and every competitor already has it.
Would love a dark theme, especially for the reports and task list views specifically.
dark mode pls my eyes are dying
Adding a system-based dark/light auto-switch would be a nice touch instead of manual toggling, if dark mode is ever built.
Voting for dark mode too - small thing but it would make a big difference for daily use.
The dashboard is way too bright and there's no way to adjust it. Not asking for a full redesign, just something easier on the eyes for long sessions.
High contrast white theme is rough for accessibility reasons, some of us are sensitive to bright screens. A dark or muted theme option would help a lot.
Slack integration just stopped syncing task updates out of nowhere. Had to disconnect and reconnect to get it working again, and it'll probably break again in a few days.
Our Slack channel hasn't received a task notification in 4 days even though the integration shows as 'connected.'
Google Calendar sync is creating duplicate events for the same task every time I edit the due date.
Every task I sync to my calendar shows up twice now. Cleaning up the duplicates manually every week is getting old.
Jira sync (through the Zapier workaround) dropped several tasks entirely, they just vanished from the Jira board.
Our Trello import never fully completed, about 30 cards are just missing with no error message.
Slack sync works but there's now a noticeable delay, like 10-15 minutes, between updating a task and seeing it reflected in the channel.
Reported the duplicate calendar event bug a month ago and it's still happening. This makes the integration basically unusable for our team's planning.
Exporting a report to CSV silently drops everything past 1000 rows. No warning, no error, I only noticed because the numbers looked wrong.
Report export is missing data - pulled a CSV of all tasks and it cuts off way before the actual total count.
The export button is buried three menus deep in the reports section. Took me way longer than it should have to find it.
Can we get Excel export with actual formatting (colors, headers) instead of plain CSV? Copy-pasting into a template every week is tedious.
Exporting to Excel with charts intact instead of just raw numbers would save me hours every month.
Exported report was supposed to have around 2400 rows based on our task count, but the CSV file only has 1000. Something is definitely cutting it off.
Not obvious that 'export' and 'download report' are two different buttons that do different things. Confused me for a good five minutes.
Comments on tasks don't show up for teammates until they manually refresh the page. Feels broken for something that should be real-time.
A task due 'Friday' shows up as Thursday on my calendar view. I'm in a timezone west of UTC so I think that's related.
Our scheduled weekly report just... stopped sending three weeks ago. No error, no notice, we only noticed because someone asked where it went.
Duplicating a project copies the tasks but not the custom fields I set up. Have to redo all of them by hand every time.
Task priority flags (Low/Medium/High) reset to default whenever I bulk-move tasks between projects.
Assigning a task to more than one person seems to silently only keep the first assignee. Second person never gets notified.
Search is returning tasks from an archived project that I specifically excluded in the filter.
Subtask completion percentage on the parent task is wildly wrong - shows 40% when all subtasks are actually done.
File uploads over 20MB fail with no error message, the progress bar just freezes at 90%.
When I rename a project, all the saved filter views tied to it silently break and show 'no results.'
Two different team members can edit the same task description at the same time and one person's changes get overwritten with no warning.
The 'mark all as read' button for notifications doesn't actually mark everything, I still have 12 unread ones after clicking it.
Recurring weekly meeting task got created 15 times in a row this morning, cluttering the whole project board.
Time zone shown in task activity logs doesn't match my account's configured timezone, off by exactly 5 hours every time.
Would be great to select a bunch of tasks at once and change their status together instead of clicking into each one individually.
Please let us choose a specific time for the daily digest email instead of it just showing up whenever. I'd want mine at 8am specifically.
Any timeline on real two-way Jira sync? Right now we're stuck maintaining tasks in both places manually which defeats the purpose.
Traveling for work a lot with spotty wifi - an offline mode for the mobile app where changes sync once I'm back online would help a ton.
We have the same five tasks every single sprint. Recurring task templates would save so much setup time.
The fixed dashboard layout doesn't fit how our team actually works. Let us rearrange or swap out widgets for the ones we care about.
Slack comment notifications post as new messages instead of threading under the original task discussion, gets messy fast in busy channels.
We bill our clients in EUR but your invoices only generate in USD, causes accounting headaches every month.
A Gantt/timeline view for projects would help a lot with visualizing dependencies across a multi-week rollout.
Custom fields on tasks - even just 2-3 free text or dropdown fields - would cover so many workflows this tool currently can't handle.
Keyboard shortcuts for common actions (new task, assign, mark done) would speed things up a lot for power users.
Our integration hits the API rate limit constantly during business hours. Could the limit be raised for Enterprise plans?
An audit log showing who changed what and when across the workspace would help a lot with internal compliance reviews.
SAML सपोर्ट चाहिए, सिर्फ Okta OAuth नहीं, ताकि हम अपने मौजूदा identity provider का इस्तेमाल करके Enterprise SSO सेट कर सकें।
Un time tracking integrato per ogni singolo task, invece di dover usare uno strumento separato, sarebbe davvero utile.
Sería genial poder invitar usuarios en bloque subiendo un CSV en lugar de invitar uno por uno.
SlackやJiraだけでなく、汎用的なWebhookがあれば、公式の統合を待たずに自分たちで自動化を構築できるのですが。
Task dependencies (blocking/blocked-by relationships) that actually prevent a task from being marked done until its blockers are resolved.
Would like to customize the columns on my personal task board instead of the default To Do / In Progress / Done setup.
Native video call integration (Zoom or Meet) directly from a task instead of copy-pasting a separate meeting link every time.
A 'watch' or follow option for tasks I'm not assigned to but want updates on would be really useful for managers.
Would love the ability to set working hours per team member so due dates and reminders respect actual availability instead of assuming 24/7.
Creating a new task takes way too many clicks - modal, then a second modal for assignee, then a third for due date. Could easily be one screen.
Error messages are so vague. 'Something went wrong' doesn't tell me anything when a save fails.
Onboarding was confusing, I didn't realize you had to create a 'workspace' before a 'project' before a 'task' - took me a while to figure out the hierarchy.
The search bar doesn't distinguish between searching tasks vs. searching people vs. searching projects, results all get jumbled together.
Notification settings are split across three different pages (account, workspace, project) with no clear reason why.
Permission levels (Viewer/Editor/Admin) aren't explained anywhere in the UI, had to guess what each one actually allows.
Filter combinations in the task list reset every time I navigate away, even though I use the same filters daily.
The report builder has too many options crammed onto one screen, genuinely hard to tell which settings matter for a basic report.
Mobile app menu icons aren't labeled, took a while to figure out which one was settings versus notifications.
Archiving a project doesn't clearly explain what happens to the tasks inside it - are they archived too, deleted, or still active?
Task due dates and reminder times use different time formats (12hr vs 24hr) depending on which screen you're on.
Would help if the billing page showed a preview of the next invoice instead of just the current balance.
It's not obvious how to leave a workspace once you've joined it, ended up emailing support just to ask.
Color coding for task priority isn't consistent between the list view and the board view, kind of confusing at a glance.
Copy is inconsistent - some buttons say 'Delete,' others say 'Remove,' seems to do the same thing but reads like they might not.
The 'default view' setting doesn't actually stick between sessions, keeps reverting to list view even though I set board view.
Generating a report for a 3-month date range takes almost a full minute. Shorter ranges are fine.
Search across the whole workspace is noticeably slower than searching within a single project.
Le televersement d'une piece jointe de 30 Mo prend plusieurs minutes et echoue parfois.
Everything feels laggy for our team between 9-10am, presumably a peak traffic thing, fine rest of the day.
The task list view with lots of subtasks expanded gets really sluggish to scroll through, like the browser is struggling to keep up.
Noticed load times got worse across the board after the v2.5.0 update, not just one specific page.
Called support about an urgent issue and waited 6 days for a first response. That's not acceptable for a paid plan.
Got moved from Pro to a 'legacy' plan without any notice and my price went up $8/month. Would've appreciated a heads up.
Support agent closed my ticket about the delayed notifications as 'resolved' without actually replying to my last message.
Renewed my plan and then this rejected billing feature request comes back with a canned 'not on our roadmap' response after 41 people asked for it. Feels like feedback goes nowhere here.
Does FlowHub support single sign-on for Enterprise customers? We're going through a security review before renewing.
What's actually different between the Pro and Enterprise plans besides price? The comparison page is pretty thin on details.
Is there a public API? Want to pull task data into our internal reporting tool.
How do I fully cancel my subscription instead of just downgrading to Free? Can't find the option anywhere.
Can I rename my workspace after creating it, or is that locked in permanently?
i cant log in, is there a support number i can call instead of email
Voces oferecem desconto para organizacoes sem fins lucrativos ou para uso educacional? Nao encontrei essa informacao na pagina de precos.
Okta SSO login has been a huge win for our onboarding process, new hires get access so much faster now that they don't need separate credentials. Great addition.
Password reset actually works now! Got the email in under a minute this time. Appreciate the fix.
Just wanted to say the new task calendar view is genuinely great, makes weekly planning so much easier for our team.
Customer support fixed my billing question in under 20 minutes over chat today, fantastic experience, wanted to pass along the feedback.
Been using FlowHub for almost a year now and honestly it's the best PM tool we've tried for a small remote team.
The mobile app redesign is a big step up, feels much snappier and easier to navigate than the old version.
Simple but appreciated: love that task templates save time every sprint. Small thing, big impact.
5 estrellas, hace exactamente lo que necesitamos sin funciones innecesarias. La configuracion tomo unos 15 minutos para todo el equipo.
not sure if this is the right place but ok
just wanted to check in and see how things are going with the product roadmap overall, no specific issue
make it better please. thanks

This might be more of a general comment than a specific request but I think the whole platform could use a refresh in general - hard to pin down anything specific, just an overall feeling after using it for a while.
